name: ☕️📸 — Mochaccino Cookie
description:
A member of SCOOP, she is an unknown visitor to the Time Balance Department, encountering Croissant Cookie and answering to Timekeeper Cookie. She is able to take photos of monsters and anomalies within timelines. She works in the Intelligence Division of SCOOP. She works under Timekeeper Cookie as well.

Appearance: Mochaccino Cookie is a pretty slim Cookie of pale-brown dough. She has coffee colored eyes which bear long eyelashes. Her cheeks have a gentle blush which complements her dough, and she has a friendly smile.

With that, she has really long light brown hair and white streaks; there is a long braid on the side. She wears a dark brown top with puffy sleeves, a white tie with a tint of brown in the center, and a white yellowish puffy skirt. She also wears dark brown heels. She also owns a long white jacket with some coffee grain motifs.

Mochaccino Cookie adorns a coffee grain earring, and sports a brown hat which represents a cup of coffee. Lastly, she holds a suitcase that appears to have a camera.
creator: bloomingtonarrows
